rationale.R1.3: The revised draft audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The revised draft marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The revised draft is harm-free but with one minor regression (using RM-13B as the evaluation judge, which introduces circularity).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the revised draft is annotated with source and reason.
